summary: Show the resolved repo-owned workspace config layered onto product defaults.

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output
field selector for exact JSON drill-down

steps.description: Load workspace config, defaults, and local override state.
Return only requested JSON fields when --select is provided.
Emit resolved config in the requested format.

guards: Report config without writing repo state.
Treat missing repo config as product-default resolution.
Prefer --select for exact field drill-down and --verbose only for broad diagnostics.
proof: json output remains compatible with existing config command tests
config.report uses an operation-local emit fragment executed by generated Python and TypeScript targets

skill.instruction_summary: Use this operation when an agent needs the effective workspace config.

ir_plan.summary: Config report executes generated operation IR through codegen-owned primitive dataflow, using an operation-local report emission fragment while workspace runtime supplies config loading and text compatibility formatting.

steps.description: Resolve and validate the target root for config lookup.
Load workspace config, defaults, local overrides, and valid module metadata.
Select and emit report output through a reusable operation-local fragment.

fragments.description: Reusable report tail that selects requested fields and emits the command output.

steps.description: Select the requested config profile or exact field projection.
Emit config output in the requested format.
